action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet50 baseline achieved 0.5319 balanced accuracy, with severe degradation on few-shot classes (0.1284). Analysis: A stronger pre-trained model like CLIP ViT-B/16 has better representations and might generalize better to few-shot classes even without explicit re-weighting. Decision: Switch to CLIP ViT-B/16, adjust normalization, reduce batch size to 64 to prevent OOM, and train for 10 epochs to establish a new baseline.
